accessNotes.en: I episimi tavtotita Aretsous tekmirionei astiki akti brosta apo tin Kalamaria, me prosvasi odikos toso me idiotika mesa oso kai me mesa mazikis metaforas. Simantiko: to idio profil anaferei eidiki simansi pou apagorevei tin kolymvisi.
accessNotes.gr: Η επίσημη ταυτότητα Αρετσούς τεκμηριώνει αστική ακτή μπροστά από την Καλαμαριά, με πρόσβαση οδικώς τόσο με ιδιωτικά μέσα όσο και με μέσα μαζικής μεταφοράς. Σημαντικό: το ίδιο προφίλ αναφέρει ειδική σήμανση που απαγορεύει την κολύμβηση.

sourceNotes: Thessaloniki official bathing-profile cleanup 2026-05-29: official Aretsou bathing profile supports identity, Kalamaria urban location, road and public-transport access, sandy shore and seabed, shallow first-meter water with gentle seabed slope, unorganized status, WC, showers, waste baskets, municipal refreshment facility, eucalyptus vegetation, nearby marina context, and official signage prohibiting swimming. Confidence promoted to medium and officialWarningOverride set true so this coast is not recommended for swimming. No wind, wave, or live-condition claim was added.

sourceNotes: Thessaloniki official bathing-profile cleanup 2026-05-29: official Asprovalta-Vrasna 1 bathing profile supports same coastal-zone identity for the Asprovalta shore, private-road access, sandy shore and seabed, shallow first-meter water with smooth seabed slope, partly organized sections, sunbeds, fixed umbrellas, changing rooms, WC, showers, waste bins, outdoor refreshment facilities, an organized camping area on the eastern part of the coast, and lifeguard staff in organized sections. The app-facing KAAU Asprovaltas label was left unchanged pending a later naming cleanup. Confidence promoted to medium; no wind, wave, or live-condition claim was added.

accessNotes.en: I episimi tavtotita Stavrou kalyptei ti megali akti opou anaferontai oi oikismoi Stavros kai Milies sta akra tis. To bathing profile tekmirionei odiki prosvasi me idiotika mesa kai mesa mazikis metaforas, eno i episimi touristiki selida topothetei tis Milies konta ston kentriko dromo tis periochis.
accessNotes.gr: Η επίσημη ταυτότητα Σταυρού καλύπτει τη μεγάλη ακτή όπου αναφέρονται οι οικισμοί Σταυρός και Μηλιές στα άκρα της. Το bathing profile τεκμηριώνει οδική πρόσβαση με ιδιωτικά μέσα και μέσα μαζικής μεταφοράς, ενώ η επίσημη τουριστική σελίδα τοποθετεί τις Μηλιές κοντά στον κεντρικό δρόμο της περιοχής.

sourceNotes: Popular source-backed confidence pass AT 2026-06-02: official bathing-water profile for Stavros supports the broad Stavros-Milies coastal-zone identity, 2 km sandy shore, sandy seabed, shallow first metres with gentle seabed slope, partly organized sections, loungers, fixed umbrellas, showers, bins, refreshment stands, lifeguard staff, road/private/public-transport access and broadleaf-tree area. Promoted to high for static beach facts only; coordinates, photos, windProfile, scoring and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

accessNotes.en: To episimo profile Potamos anaferei odiki prosvasi mono me idiotiko meso kai oti orismenes diodoi tis aktis den einai vates gia koina ochimata. I topiki pigi gia to Navagio Epanomis perigrafei dromo me varia ammo kai off-road synthikes, opote i prosvasi menei dyskoli kai ochi apli paralia me asfalto.
accessNotes.gr: Το επίσημο profile Ποταμός αναφέρει οδική πρόσβαση μόνο με ιδιωτικό μέσο και ότι ορισμένες δίοδοι της ακτής δεν είναι βατές για κοινά οχήματα. Η τοπική πηγή για το Ναυάγιο Επανομής περιγράφει δρόμο με βαριά άμμο και off-road συνθήκες, οπότε η πρόσβαση μένει δύσκολη και όχι απλή παραλία με άσφαλτο.

sourceNotes: Popular source-backed confidence pass AU 2026-06-02: official Potamos bathing-water profile directly supports the Epanomi cape coastal zone and explicitly identifies the stranded dredger shipwreck east of Cape Epanomi. It supports a 10.2 km natural sandy shore, sandy seabed, shallow first metres with gentle seabed slope, partly organized sections on the wider Potamos coast, refreshment facilities especially toward the eastern section, private-vehicle road access with some routes not passable by ordinary vehicles, and Epanomi lagoon/wetland context. Promoted to high for static beach facts only; coordinates, photos, windProfile, scoring and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

Pass AU static metadata: Thermaikos Guide directly identifies Navagio Epanomis as a beach/shipwreck destination, supports nearby canteens with snacks/drinks, heavy-sand/off-road access conditions, and snorkeling/diving context around the wreck. The exact shipwreck segment stays not organized, parking was not added, depth remains a static shallow-profile fact, snorkeling is enabled as a static activity only, surfing stays false, and marketing condition wording from sources was not imported into environment quiet, windProfile, scoring logic or live condition claims.

sourceNotes: Popular confidence pass 2026-06-02: Visit Thermaikos supports Perea as a seaside destination with beach promenade, cafes, bars, restaurants and sea-transport context; official Blue Flag pages support awarded Peraia beach sections.
